HowToUseApi.title: How to use API
HowToUseApi.intro: Use this guide to integrate your partner site with Manga Tracker without extension. This page only shows partner-facing steps.
HowToUseApi.baseUrlLabel: Current API base URL in this frontend
HowToUseApi.baseUrlNote: Use your production API URL in real integrations. Endpoints below are relative to this base.

partner.title: Partner site (CLIENT)
partner.body: Submits application, exchanges connect codes for tokens, and syncs chapter updates from its own backend.

user.title: End user
user.body: Generates a short-lived connect code in Manga Tracker and shares it with the partner site.

platform.title: Manga Tracker (automatic)
platform.body: After approval, credentials are issued and sync requests are validated automatically.

application.title: 1) Submit public application
application.body: Register your partner site in the public waitlist.
application.request:
{
  "requestedSlug": "site-a",
  "name": "Site A",
  "contactEmail": "tech@site-a.com",
  "siteUrl": "https://site-a.com",
  "allowedDomains": ["site-a.com"],
  "useCase": "Sync chapter progress from Site A"
}

notes.1: This endpoint is public and rate-limited.
notes.2: Submitting does not activate integration immediately.

approval.title: 2) Wait for application approval
approval.body: When approved, you receive an email with partnerSlug, clientSecret and the next steps.

notes.1: No partner API call is required in this step.

userConnectCode.title: 3) Ask the user for the connect code
userConnectCode.body: The user generates the code inside Manga Tracker and shares it with your site.

notes.1: Connect code expires in 5 minutes and is single-use.

exchange.title: 4) Exchange code for access token
exchange.body: Your backend exchanges the user code for a partner access token.

sync.title: 5) Sync read chapters
sync.body: Send chapter progress updates from your backend.
sync.request:
Headers:
  Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>
  x-idempotency-key: <unique-event-id>

Body:
{
  "partnerSlug": "site-a",
  "externalMangaId": "one-piece-123",
  "title": "One Piece",
  "chapter": 1123,
  "sourceDomain": "site-a.com"
}

notes.2: Reuse the same idempotency key on retries.

items.1: Store clientSecret only on backend (never in frontend code).
items.2: Always send sourceDomain and keep your allowedDomains list updated.
items.4: Use HTTPS in production for all partner traffic.

items.1: Only manga:write scope is accepted in this MVP.
items.2: If incoming chapter <= current chapter, outcome is noop.
items.3: Access token expires in 30 days (2592000 seconds).
items.4: Created/updated/noop outcomes indicate sync result per request.
